title: How do I remove Archives and Templates from the Unified Folder View OSX app?
creator: mozilla838
content:
I don't use Archives or Templates. There is no folder on my servers that correspond to these and they are not subscribed in my IMAP settings.

They don't appear in the per-account view. But they somehow appear in the unified folder view.

I am not able to figure out how to make them disappear.

Help.

title: Migração e-mail ThunderBird (POP) para Outlook (PST) | Migrating Thunderbird email (POP) to Outlook (PST)
creator: dannylo.dias
content:
Olá, tudo bem? Preciso de uma ajuda referente a migração de um e-mail do ThunderBird que está configurado como POP para um pst pois preciso configurar os antigos e-mail também. Tentei ferramentas como o Storemail home, porém não houve sucesso. Saberiam me ajudar?

Hello, how are you? I need some help regarding migrating a Thunderbird email account that is configured as POP to a PST file, because I need to set up the old emails as well. I tried tools like MailStore Home, but had no success. Could you help me out?

title: Authentication errors when trying to send outgoing messages
creator: spacegardenuniverse
content:
Hi there,

When attempting to send emails through Thunderbird, I get the following error messages:

Login to server smtp.long-mcquade.com with username jmurphy@long-mcquade.com failed.

Sending of the message failed. Unable to authenticate to Outgoing server (SMTP) . Please check the password and verify the ‘Authentication method’ in ‘Account Settings | Outgoing server (SMTP)’.

When testing the server connection in server settings and outgoing server settings, I successfully establish a connection, yet I am still unable to send messages.

title: TB151.0 Link to Outlook Calendar
creator: tmccaffery
content: I updated to TB151.0 and lost access to my Outlook e-mail and calendar. After re-loading OWL my e-mail returned. However, I am unable to re-link on a read/write/synchronize basis to my Outlook calendar. I have tried adding a new calendar in every way I can think of and nothing works. I am tired of fighting with TB over this and am about to dump it and set up my accounts on Outlook. Please help me give TB one more chance.

title: moving T-Bird to another computer trashed my installation
creator: DanRaymer
content: I've done it many times - copy the folder under Profiles to a big memory stick, copy that into Profiles on my other (travel) computer, and all is well. But this time, I got the "old version of T-Bird" message. Nothing I try fixes it. I made sure that both computers downloaded today's versions. It keeps giving me the "old version F you" message. Help!!!!

title: I cannot remember my email password.
creator: PaulScesniak
content: In setting up a new PC (laptop), I must make my password known to the software. But I cannot remember my password. On my existing, older, laptop, I saved my email password long ago i.e. I do not have to enter my password, on the older laptop in order to get email. I no longer remember my own password. How do I find my password on my existing, older, laptop ? Thank You. <[edited from public forum] @attglobal.net>
